mapper.select: select temp2.author_id as tool_author_id, temp2.tool_id as tool_tool_id from (select temp1.tool_id, temp1.author_id, row_number() over (partition by temp1.tool_id, temp1.author_id) as rn2 from (select temp0.* from (select *, row_number() over (partition by t_b_tool_main.tool_id, t_b_tool_main.author_id order by t_b_tool_main.id desc) as rn1 from t_b_tool_main where t_b_tool_main.deleted = 0 and t_b_tool_main.publish != 0 and t_b_tool_main.review = 'PASS' ) as temp0 where temp0.rn1 = 1 ) as temp1 left join t_s_user as tsu on tsu.deleted = 0 and tsu.id = temp1.author_id where tsu.username = #{username} order by temp1.publish desc ) as temp2 where temp2.rn2 = 1

select count(1) from t_b_tool_main where t_b_tool_main.deleted = 0 and t_b_tool_main.author_id = #{authorId} and t_b_tool_main.tool_id = #{toolId} and t_b_tool_main.publish != 0 and t_b_tool_main.review = 'PASS'
